AVEMUJICA-OBLIVION.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Oblivion[/gold], deal damage to the lowest HP enemy equal to your [gold]Oblivion[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-OBLIVION.smartDescription: Whenever you gain [gold]Oblivion[/gold], deal damage to the lowest HP enemy equal to your [gold]Oblivion[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-OBLIVION.title: Oblivion
AVEMUJICA-HOW_DARE_YOU.description: Whenever you are attacked, [gold]Doloris[/gold] deals [blue]6[/blue] damage to the attacker and increases this effect's damage by [blue]1[/blue].
AVEMUJICA-HOW_DARE_YOU.smartDescription: Whenever you are attacked, [gold]Doloris[/gold] deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to the attacker and increases this effect's damage by [blue]1[/blue].
AVEMUJICA-HOW_DARE_YOU.title: How Dare You!
